Near-critical pilot sweep p_N = 1/2 - c/N  (M = 1e5 per cell, all-ones leaves)
A = E[log X_N]/sqrt(N); critical baseline rows have c = 0 (p = 1/2).
Lemma limit = (1-2p)/(1-p), the fixed-p N->inf limit of P(X_N = 1).

  N    c           p_N  E[logX]      SE       A    SE_A   P(X=1)       SE   lemma

Deficit D(c,N) = A(0,N) - A(c,N)  [amplitude cost of the perturbation]:
  N        0.5       1.0       2.0

Doubling cross-checks (same p_N, different N -- discriminates c- vs p-scaling):
  p = 0.4791666667:
    (c=0.5, N=24): E[logX] = 2.9624 (0.0059)   A = 0.6047
    (c=1.0, N=48): E[logX] = 3.8625 (0.0077)   A = 0.5575
  p = 0.4583333333:
    (c=1.0, N=24): E[logX] = 2.2999 (0.0053)   A = 0.4695
    (c=2.0, N=48): E[logX] = 2.6152 (0.0062)   A = 0.3775
